hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; const bad=['text-[#','bg-[#','border-[#','text-[rgb','bg-[rgb']; const found=bad.filter(p=>f&&require('fs').existsSync(f)&&require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8').includes(p)); if(found.length){console.error('uvpln: color hardcodeado detectado — usá un token del design system');process.exit(2);}"

node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(f&&(f.endsWith('.tsx')||f.endsWith('.ts'))){const c=require('fs').existsSync(f)?require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8'):''; const anyCount=(c.match(/:\s*any/g)||[]).length; if(anyCount>0){console.warn('uvpln: encontré '+anyCount+' uso(s) de `any` en '+f+' — ojo con eso parcero');}}"
